text_original: Interesting Would be five stars but recently, language filters have begun, and I can't find how to shut them off.
text_zh: 挺有意思的。本来可以给五星，但最近开始启用了语言过滤，我找不到怎么关掉它。
reply_original: Thanks for the 4 stars! To comply with Google Play's strict platform policies, the content filter cannot be turned off. We must maintain this moderation to keep the app available. We appreciate your understanding! If you have any specific feedback or questions, please email us at support@fantachat.ai.
reply_zh: 感谢您的4星好评！为了遵守 Google Play 严格的平台政策，内容过滤功能无法关闭。我们必须维持这一审核机制，以确保应用能够继续上架。感谢您的理解！如果您有任何具体的反馈或问题，请发送电子邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。
